metadata.title: SYNGO_CC_875
metadata.comment:
Rationale: The paper characterizes the sub cellular localization of both mu-type and delta-type opioid receptors using immuogold-silver and peroxidase labelling.
Figure 1 is a quantification of the labelled profiles, showing a very high labeling rate of delta-type opioid receptors at dendritic spines.
Figure 2 presents a quantification, showing that in labelled spines, a large proportion of delta-tpye immunolabeling is at the spine apparatus.
Figure 4a shows a direct association of delta-type opioid receptors immunoreactivity with the spine apparatus.. Experimental description: 'Seven adult male Sprague Dawley rats (250-350 gm; Taconic, Germantown, NY) were anesthetized with sodium pentobarbital (100 mg/kg, i.p.).'
